message:
feat(core,db): improve BOCPD, conformal prediction, disk monitoring, evidence ledger, and cache

Concurrent agent updates to core statistical and storage components:
- BOCPD (Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection) refinements
- Conformal prediction calibration improvements
- Disk monitoring enhancements
- Evidence ledger updates
- DB cache layer improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
